paper_title: Paleoecology and Paleoclimate Analysis of Tanjung Formation

methods.description: Analysis of palaeoecological and palaeoclimatic changes using spore-pollen percentage charts, AP/NAP percentage charts, and Marine/Non-Marine Taxa percentage charts in a palynological diagram.

steps.description: Divide the graph into three time deposition intervals from older to younger.
steps.searchable_summary: segment palynological diagram into three time intervals

steps.description: Analyze the AP/NAP chart and Spore/Polen chart for interval A to observe palaeoecological changes.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze AP/NAP and Spore/Polen charts for interval A

steps.description: Compare the trends in AP/NAP and Spore/Polen charts for interval B to determine environmental changes.
steps.searchable_summary: compare AP/NAP and Spore/Polen trends for interval B

steps.description: Evaluate the stability of palaeoecological and palaeoclimatical changes in interval C using the AP/NAP and Spore/Polen charts.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate stability of changes in interval C
outputs: stability of changes for interval C

steps.description: Interpret environmental changes based on the percentage of Acrostichum aureum and marine taxa.
steps.searchable_summary: interpret environmental changes from Acrostichum aureum and marine taxa percentages
